Name: Goblin
Special: Pack tactics (free). Goblin Shaman variant: Spell-like ability hex 1/day (1pt) instead.
Notes: Cowardly alone; dangerous in numbers. Flee when half their group falls. Represent Tier 1 Small baseline.

Name: Cave Bear
Special: Grab/grapple (1pt). Keen senses - smell (free). On hit can grab instead of dealing damage; held target takes automatic d8/round; STR task to escape.
Notes: Not hostile unless cornered or protecting cubs. Represents Tier 2 Large. Note: same tier as a Tier 2 Hunter (12 HP) - a genuine threat.

Name: Swamp Troll
Special: Regeneration (2pts) - recovers 2 HP per round stopped by fire or acid. Keen senses - smell (free).
Notes: Tracks by scent. Rarely abandons a chase. Effectively immortal unless wounds cauterized. Represents Tier 3 Huge.

Name: Iron Sentinel
Special: Veteran +1 FC (1pt). +1 AR (1pt). +1 AR again (1pt). Never flees (1pt). Immune to poison fear and mental effects (free - construct).
Notes: Ancient relic guardian still executing original function. AR 3 from constructed plating. Does not negotiate. Represents Tier 4 Medium with full point budget spent on defense and reliability rather than offense.

Name: Elder Wyvern
Special: Veteran +1 FC (1pt). +1 extra attack (1pt). Poison sting (1pt) - RES save or condition 2 slots. +1 AR (1pt). Frightful presence (1pt) - CHA save or -1 ATK/DEF. Keen senses (free).
Notes: Sting counts as third attack. Can disengage freely if airborne. Represents Tier 5 Large with full budget.

Name: Void Colossus
Special: Veteran +1 FC (1pt). Powerful magic 1/day (2pts) - Tier 4-5 effect. Legendary resistance (2pts) - twice per encounter. Frightful presence (1pt) - entire visible area.
Notes: Ancient construct or cosmic entity of unclear origin. Powerful magic might be a reality-distorting pulse or a targeted annihilation beam. Legendary resistance usable twice. Represents Tier 6 Colossal with full budget.
